description: This is a test suite for the Offcanvas component in a Bootstrap-like library. It contains unit tests verifying the behavior of the Offcanvas class, including its constructor, configuration, show/hide/toggle methods, event handling, and integration with jQuery. The tests also cover edge cases such as preventing default actions, focus trapping, and disposal.

classes.name: Offcanvas
classes.description: The main class representing the offcanvas component, with methods for showing, hiding, toggling, disposing, and managing configuration and events.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Offcanvas instance associated with a DOM element, or null if none exists.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Offcanvas instance or creates a new one with optional configuration.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the offcanvas element, managing classes, focus, and backdrop.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the offcanvas element, managing classes, focus, and backdrop.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the visibility of the offcanvas element.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes of the offcanvas instance, cleaning up event listeners and DOM references.
